general_news.title: EU fact of the day
general_news.summary: You do not hear this point made too often, yet it is true: Very interesting new study finding that *even in large European cities*, in most places it is easier to access opportunities by car than by public transport https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.01019 The exceptions are Paris, Zurich and the innermost parts of Milan and Barcelona That is […] The post EU fact of the day appeared first on Marginal REVOLUTION.
